subtasks.description: An infrastructure engineer proposes rolling out Docker image changes to all microservices in production without prior staging validation.

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Proposed action violates three critical policies: (1) POL-601 requires 48-hour staging validation which is bypassed, (2) POL-602 requires change board approval and monitoring setup not mentioned in proposal, (3) POL-603 requires rollback capability and traffic monitoring not described. Production rollout of untested container images without these safeguards poses significant operational risk.
applied_constraints: Staging validation must complete for minimum 48 hours
Change board approval required before production deployment
Post-deployment monitoring infrastructure must be established
Automated rollback mechanism must be verified and ready
Traffic monitoring and alerting must be configured
